name: spanner-toolkit
description: Spanner's working skill set for Claude Code — project setup, SpannerOS schema migrations and CRUD scaffolding, the Torque product-UI language, the design-review loop, operating model, internal-portal deploy, domain/SSL/DNS troubleshooting, weekly digest, matrix task sync, and meeting notes (Granola/Zoom/Otter → Notion, with optional screenshot enrichment). Gives terminal Claude Code the same Spanner skills that Cowork and the desktop/browser app get from the org skill library.
